title: Wire orphaned modules into lib.rs: BaggingClassifier, BaggingRegressor, AdaBoostRegressor
description:
ferrolearn-tree/src/bagging.rs and ferrolearn-tree/src/adaboost_regressor.rs are fully implemented but NEVER declared via pub mod or pub use in lib.rs. The types compile but are unreachable from outside the crate. Functional bug — these estimators are silently missing from the public API.

Fix: add pub mod adaboost_regressor; pub mod bagging; and re-export their public types at the crate root. Ensure module docs in lib.rs reference all three new estimators.
